title: No wolf armor
description: This texture pack changes the texture of the wolf armor, making it invisible so you can admire your favorite pet
body:
This resourcepack makes ~~a more invisible~~ (_maybe chud later I'll add_) **invisible** armor for the wolf.


<details>
<summary>Picture</summary>

![picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oRjDmEJd/images/957d491984cb5de7264814bcbf8b5a3589b12f54.jpeg)

</details>

---

<details>
<summary>Degree of armor breakage</summary>

### I did not remove the degree of armor breakage as it could result in the loss of your beloved comrade.
![break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oRjDmEJd/images/4c8074335291f69a05cb145f941354126b4aac6e.png)

</details>
